title: Viners Barware Gold Brushed Stainless Steel Cocktail Shaker, 500 Millilitre
features: CLASSIC BARWARE | This gold colour cocktail shaker is indispensable for any entertainer and a stylish addition to any home bar. Use it to create your own signature cocktails. The elegant gift box makes it the perfect gift for any occasion

SHAKEN NOT STIRRED | For the true cocktail enthusiast or mixologist, this is the ideal cocktail shaker. The lid creates an airtight seal and has an integral strainer. The 500ml capacity is enough for mixing one to two drinks
BRUSHED GOLD | Made from fine quality stainless steel, our drink mixer is strong with a brushed finish that won't scuff easily or tarnish. Hand wash only without using abrasive sponges

BARWARE RANGE | Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners Barware Collection. Our range has all the tools to professionally entertain guests at home, from cocktail shakers to stirrers and bottle openers

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust barware made from the finest materials
description: From the manufacturer Silver Cocktail Shaker Cocktail Stirrers 6PCE Set Long Steel Drinking Straws Gift Box Waiter's Friend Glass Cocktail Shaker Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.9 out of 5 stars 43 5.0 out of 5 stars 5 5.0 out of 5 stars 2 4.5 out of 5 stars 162 4.1 out of 5 stars 8 Price £7.39 £ 7 . 39 £7.82 £ 7 . 82 £3.15 £ 3 . 15 £4.00 £ 4 . 00 £14.95 £ 14 . 95 Description This classic shaped cocktail shaker with a brushed steel finish features an airtight lid with integral strainer - perfect for preparing creative cocktails at home. Mix your favourite cocktail and add a glamorous finish to your hiball glass with these elegant stainless steel cocktail stirrers. Reduce plastic waste by using these reusable and durable long stainless steel straws. Supplied with a cleaning brush, the straws are easy to clean and can be used time and time again. This 2 step waiter's friend is a corkscrew with a double-lever action, offering a smooth and speedy operation. A favourite among sommeliers, bar professionals and waiters alike. Perfect your mixology skills with this sophisticated cocktail shaker. Made from durable, heavy weight glass with a decorative, linear cut design. The ideal size for a single cocktail drink serving.
